A.text: The North Pacific is mostly unchanged or cooling, while the South Pacific is mostly warming.

B.text: Both the North and South Pacific are mostly warming.

C.text: Both the North and South Pacific are mostly unchanged.

D.text: The North Pacific is mostly warming, while the South Pacific is mostly cooling.

parsed.answer_value: The North Pacific is mostly unchanged or cooling, while the South Pacific is mostly warming.
parsed.rationale: The map shows the North Pacific with cooler colors (blue and green), indicating little to no warming or cooling, while the South Pacific displays warmer colors (yellow and red), indicating warming trends.
